figures.caption: Table 1. Efficiency and accuracy comparison under different decoding strategies (generation length is equal to 256). We use one NVIDIA H200 141 GB GPU to measure the latency (second). Rows of our methods are highlighted in light gray, latency speedup and NFE reduction over Vanilla is shown in green. R2-dLLM (F) represents only applying our training-free redundancy reduction, and R2-dLLM (T) utilizes SFT to reduce redundancy.
Figure 2. An illustration of spatial redundancy.
Figure 6. Training dynamics of LLaDA-Instruct-8B on GSM8K, showing loss, Rtotal, NFE, and accuracy over training iterations.
Figure 3. Overview of the proposed training-free redundancy reduction strategy during diffusion decoding.
Figure 8. Effect of Generation Length on Decoding Efficiency and Accuracy.
Figure 5. Redundancy-aware training dataset collection: For each prompt, candidate responses with correct answers and the lowest redundancy score Rtotal are selected.
